title: Summary: Turn 28
content: Pueblo is a TypeScript (Node.js 22 LTS) code agent framework with a CLI-first and optional Electron desktop architecture, built using tsc + Vite, tested with Vitest, and backed by SQLite (better-sqlite3). Core src/ modules include agent, cli, commands, desktop (main/preload/renderer/shared), memory, persistence, prompts, providers, sessions, shared, and tools; the runtime initializes SQLite, loads providers, and either runs a CLI loop or hands off to an Electron window.
